misconfig_patterns: API key not configured in default deployment — REST API fully open
/dashboard web UI accessible without credentials even when REST API key is configured
Read-write and read-only API keys not distinguished

active_probe.false_positive_check: response title field must equal 'qdrant - vector search engine'

deployment_tells: /dashboard web UI open in browser at :6333/dashboard
pivot_paths: GET /collections → collection list without auth in default deployment
GET /dashboard → full collection browser, vector count, payload fields
GET /openapi.json → enumerate all endpoints including collection management
